name: Snowy | She forgot your Christmas Gift!
description:
Artist: Nonalterna

Intro

The time has come, Christmas.

Pure jollyness around the world, around the places and the houses, people spreading it by gifts for their family and friends.

Aswell the time where Winter break comes, letting students be with their families, enjoying the rest of the christmas after studying so hard (a few).

Hopefully, you and your best friend, Snowy have all the month free because some kid pulled off a brown nuke on the school's toilets... Yet you two have the gifts to give each other... Right?

Well, Snowy FORGOT about her gift and she now says sje will get you the gift later...

Who decided that?

You'll have your own gift from her.

Merry Christmas!, yall are the best, thanks for the 130 and some followers, i've never thought someone would chat with my bots. I really appreciate it <3 (think of this bot as a real Christmas Special)

I really had in mind making this a smut bit again (it is) but i decided to add a extra detail to it, so.... Try to not light up fireworks hehe.

Also i hid more people in the pfp or the bot heheheheheh, merry christmas!

I also decided to make this more earlier before it is 26th.

I forgor to add Scenario context💔🥀🥀🥀

Eh, it still follows the main scenario if you choose the sax way
